name: Balanced Gut Probiotics
shortDescription: Living cultures and prebiotic fiber, entered side by side in the herbalist's ledger as old companions. A daily measure that supports normal digestion and helps maintain a balanced, well-kept gut.

name: Immunity Mushroom Complex
shortDescription: Turkey tail, reishi, and shiitake — the forest floor's quiet stalwarts, gathered into one hearty blend. Supports a healthy, resilient immune system through every season.

name: Joint & Mobility
shortDescription: Glucosamine, turmeric root, and green-lipped mussel, milled for the dog who still insists on the long way home. Supports healthy joints and easy, gladsome movement.

name: Foundational Health Daily
shortDescription: A whole-food daily multivitamin — the first entry in any good ledger — balanced to support overall vitality from nose to tail. Prepared in Adult and Puppy formulas.

name: Paw Saver
shortDescription: Considered care for hardworking paws, keeping pads supported and conditioned through seasons of gravel, salt, sand, and trail.

name: Pumpkin Power
shortDescription: A pumpkin-forward fiber blend, warm and unhurried as an October field. Promotes regularity and everyday digestive comfort.

name: Recovery & Hydration
shortDescription: A well-measured electrolyte formula for the far side of a good day out. Supports normal hydration and recovery after exercise, travel, and warm afternoons.
